results.title: RIIZE Takes 2nd Win For “Do your dance” On “Music Bank”
results.description: RIIZE has won their second music show trophy for “Do your dance”! KBS 2TV’s “Music Bank” did not air a new episode on June 26, but the music show still announced this week’s winner on its official website. RIIZE took the win with a total of 15,059 points on the Music Bank K-Chart from June 15... Continue reading RIIZE Takes 2nd Win For “Do your dance” On “Music Bank” The post RIIZE Takes 2nd Win For “Do your dance” On “Music Bank” appeared first on Soompi .

results.title: 'Mysaa' UPDATE: Nidhi Singh's fierce avatar unveiled in NEW POSTER
results.description: Fans of the upcoming pan-India action thriller 'Mysaa' were treated to a special surprise as Nidhi Singh's character poster was unveiled on her birthday. The film, starring Rashmika Mandanna, is currently in production and slated for a 2026 release. The newly released poster showcases Nidhi Singh in a powerful and intense avatar, adding to the growing anticipation for the project.
